goal_text:
You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'leicester' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
The train should 'arrive by 17:15' and should leave on 'tuesday'.
Make sure you get 'train ID' and 'departure time'.
You are also looking for a 'particular restaurant'. Its name is called 'city stop restaurant'.
Make sure you get 'phone number' and 'postcode'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants
You are looking for a train. The train should go to leicester and should depart from cambridge
The train should arrive by 17:15 and should leave on tuesday
Make sure you get train ID and departure time
You are also looking for a particular restaurant. Its name is called city stop restaurant
Make sure you get phone number and postcode
